meaning: n.二十几岁,一生中 20 至 2岁的十年adj.二十几岁
examples: He started going bald in his twenties.
They're both in their twenties and both married with children of their own.
They take him to a party where everyone is dressed in evening clothes from the nineteen-twenties.
Over thirty years starting in the twenties, it wiped out much of the banana production.
